package rulecoverage

func PositiveUpstreamConsumedInterfaceDeclaredInProviderPackage() string {
    ruleID := "upstream_consumed_interface_declared_in_provider_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Provider packages that declare an interface even though upstream packages appear to own the abstraction seam."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
